p901ReviewStatus.summary: ISO52016 decomposition review and component map added without formula, fixture, expected-value, runtime, or API changes.

p901aCharacterizationStatus.summary: ISO52016 behavior characterization inventory and focused seam tests added without formula, expected-value fixture, runtime, or API changes.

p901bMatrixSolverSeamDesignStatus.summary: ISO52016 matrix/solver seam design and risk register added without formula, expected-value, fixture, runtime, or API changes.

p901b1MatrixSolverCharacterizationHarden.summary: ISO52016 matrix/solver characterization hardening added without formula, expected-value, fixture, runtime, or API changes.

coverageAreas.scope: Local solar time, solar position, Perez/aniso irradiance, annual weather/solar profiles, and shading/window benchmark fixtures.
knownLimitations: No formal standard-case validation completion claim.

coverageAreas.scope: Single-zone and multi-zone matrix fixtures, adjacent boundaries, weather/solar input chains, internal gains, and hourly/annual outputs.
knownLimitations: Reference-informed external anchors are present, but external parity is not claimed.
Formal validation program status is not claimed.

coverageAreas.scope: EN12831-style load anchors, room/floor/building aggregation, annual/coincident outputs, and cooling/heating report source fixtures.
knownLimitations: Anchor fixture breadth is strong but not exhaustive for every production configuration.

coverageAreas.scope: Trace preview, report generation/export, workflow state/history/job surfaces, and artifact listing/read response contracts.
knownLimitations: Contract and behavior characterization exists, but this is not external scientific validation evidence.
Some historical workflow limitations remain intentionally deferred.

coverageAreas.scope: Manual fixtures, external-tool candidate fixtures, case registries, evidence manifests, and release-ready relationship.
knownLimitations: External fixtures remain comparison-oriented and include placeholder/prospective cases.
No external parity/certification claim is allowed.

maturityModel.description: No meaningful validation evidence in repository scope.
Basic smoke checks without stronger invariants or traceable references.
Deterministic internal assertions and structural invariants.
Hand-derived engineering anchors with traceable fixture evidence.
Independent reference fixtures with declared tolerances/provenance.
External-tool comparison fixtures and harness candidates without parity claims.
Structured cross-implementation comparison workflows with bounded interpretation.
Future candidate for formal validation program entry after governance gates.

validationGaps.description: Older external-validation fixture metadata is uneven and not uniformly normalized for provenance quality.
validationGaps.recommendedAction: Normalize provenance metadata and fixture descriptors.
validationGaps.resolutionNotes: Added validation-fixture-provenance-model and validation-fixture-provenance-inventory; planned/placeholder and evidence-strength metadata normalized.

validationGaps.description: Report contract/behavior checks exist, but explicit traceability map from physics anchors to report fields remains fragmented.
validationGaps.recommendedAction: Consolidate report-builder traceability and fixture mapping.
validationGaps.resolutionNotes: No behavior or report-field traceability refactor is performed in P9-03.

validationGaps.description: External comparison registries include planned/placeholder entries that are useful for planning but not strong evidence for high-maturity claims.
validationGaps.recommendedAction: Promote ready entries with complete provenance and keep planned entries explicitly non-claiming.
validationGaps.resolutionNotes: P9-03 classifies planned entries, but does not promote placeholders to achieved evidence.

validationGaps.description: Validation evidence paths are spread across docs/tests/tools and need stronger single-source indexing for audits.
validationGaps.recommendedAction: Maintain a dedicated validation evidence inventory with category/maturity mapping.
validationGaps.resolutionNotes: Initial evidence inventory added in P9-00 and extended with provenance model/inventory cross-links in P9-03.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: ISO52016 solver/service decomposition review
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Review decomposition opportunities and boundary clarity for ISO52016 services while preserving behavior locks.
recommendedP9Backlog.resolutionNotes: Audit-only decomposition review completed with component map and no-physics-change boundary flags.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: ISO52016 behavior characterization inventory
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Freeze key numerical outputs and seam-level behavior assertions before decomposition refactors.
recommendedP9Backlog.resolutionNotes: Component coverage matrix and focused characterization tests were added; retained seam gaps are explicitly documented for P9-01B/P9-01C/P9-01D.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Matrix assembly/solver seam extraction design
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Define matrix assembly and solver seam extraction plan without formula changes.
recommendedP9Backlog.resolutionNotes: Design-only seam model and risk register were added with explicit no-physics/no-expected-values-change boundaries.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Matrix assembly/solver characterization hardening
recommendedP9Backlog.resolutionNotes: Focused characterization hardening tests were added and linked to seam/risk artifacts without formula or expected-value changes.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Report/diagnostics mapping seam review
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Review report and diagnostics mapping seams with characterization-first safety.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Weather/solar/gains input pipeline seam review
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Review weather/solar/gains pipeline boundaries and duplication risk without behavior change.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: ISO52016 naming/ubiquitous-language cleanup candidates
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Prepare naming cleanup candidates for approval-scoped refactor stages.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Fixture traceability to ISO52016 components
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Expand fixture-to-component traceability using provenance metadata without expected-value changes.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Heating/cooling load report builder consolidation
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Consolidate report-traceability mapping and reduce duplicated report calculation assembly logic.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Validation fixture provenance cleanup
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Normalize fixture provenance/metadata quality for manual and external-reference anchor inventories.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Route inventory deferred items phase 2
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Continue deferred route governance closure with explicit staged evidence.

recommendedP9Backlog.title: Ownership backfill apply decision remains deferred unless ADR trigger is met
recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Preserve disabled boundary and governance prerequisites before any apply-path reconsideration.

recommendedP9Backlog.goal: Plan evidence-promotion criteria for external-tool reference candidates without parity/certification overclaims.
